lede: Three Ethereum collections — two 2021 Art Blocks Curated releases, Meridian and Subscapes, and FOLIO, minted live at Bright Moments Berlin in 2022 — plus Sierra, a 2024 Avant Arte print + digital edition.
metric_note: volume figures are OpenSea marketplace volume only — they exclude primary mint proceeds, sales on other venues, and off-marketplace transfers. Meridian and Subscapes also trade on Archipelago and Blur; the totals here understate true secondary.

collections.name: Meridian
flags: Art Blocks Curated 163; shares the flagship core contract

collections.name: Subscapes
flags: Art Blocks Curated; shares the flagship core contract

collections.name: FOLIO
flags: Bright Moments (project 8 on the shared CryptoCitizens contract); minted live in Berlin

collections.name: Sierra
flags: Avant Arte print + digital release; timed edition of 100 on Polygon; no recorded OpenSea secondary — market inactive. A separate 4-piece Sierra edition exists on Base (0x7c43…3621, 0.065 ETH floor, no sales).

method: Supply, holder counts, floors, all-time and 30-day volumes: OpenSea API, snapshot 2026-07-03.
USD figures are converted at snapshot spot rates (ETH $1,759.26 — CoinGecko, 2026-07-03) and are indicative only; the ETH figures are primary.
Art Blocks collections (Meridian, Subscapes) share the flagship core contract 0xa7d8…d270; rows are identified by Art Blocks project, not by contract.
FOLIO's mint window verified on-chain: token #99 (id 8000099) minted 2022-07-17 on the Bright Moments contract.
Sierra verified via OpenSea (Polygon contract created 2024-02-04, matching Avant Arte's February 2024 digital programme).
caveats: Secondary volumes are single-venue (OpenSea); Archipelago, Blur and auction sales are not captured — treat the totals as a floor on true secondary.

Primary mint proceeds have not yet been reconstructed on-chain for these collections (Art Blocks and Bright Moments primary flows route through platform contracts with splits); the primary column is intentionally empty rather than estimated.
Holder counts are per-collection and gross — one wallet holding in multiple collections is counted once per collection.
Gondi lending terms are not included in this snapshot.
FOLIO's 100-token, 80-holder market is thin — its floor should be treated as indicative, not established.
Sierra's token market is inactive: no OpenSea secondary sales and no reliable holder count on the Polygon edition — treat the row as provenance, not a market.
DesLauriers' early 1/1 and small-edition work — 27 tokens on Tezos (hic et nunc, 2021-03 → 2022-06) and 1/1s on Foundation — is not tracked here; this record covers collection-scale releases only.
